# Story 1.1: Login Session and Compliance Contract

Status: done

<!-- Generated by BMAD 6.8 create-story workflow on 2026-06-17. -->

## Story

As a traveler,
I want a reliable phone-login session contract with compliance metadata,
so that the mobile login screen can authenticate me without inventing a separate auth stack.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Existing auth routes are reused and hardened in place: `/auth/otp/start`, `/auth/otp/verify`, `/me`, `/sessions`, `/logout`, and `/sessions/:id` remain the auth/session surface unless OpenAPI forces a compatible rename.
2. OTP start validates phone/region, returns retry timing and `captcha_required`, and can require Tencent Captcha through env or feature-flag policy without changing the client response contract.
3. OTP verify establishes an httpOnly session cookie, returns a user identifier, and does not log phone, OTP, or secret values.
4. Authenticated session routes return the current user/session list and support logout/session delete with standard error envelopes for expired or missing auth.
5. OpenAPI documents the auth/session contract and generated TypeScript API types are refreshed instead of hand-edited.
6. Login compliance metadata is available for the future mobile UI: privacy policy URL, user agreement URL, enabled login methods, and iOS equal-weight ordering guidance for Apple, phone, and WeChat.
7. Validation covers happy path, invalid request bodies, unauthenticated access, logout/session clearing, and captcha-required policy behavior.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Harden auth route contracts (AC: 1, 2, 3, 4)
  - [x] Extend existing `apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts`; do not create a parallel auth router.
  - [x] Keep validation at route boundaries with Zod or OpenAPI-compatible schemas.
  - [x] Preserve `authGuard` behavior from `apps/server/src/plugins/auth.ts` and standard error envelope semantics.
- [x] Add compliance/login configuration surface (AC: 6)
  - [x] Provide privacy/user-agreement URLs and enabled login-method metadata from env/config defaults.
  - [x] Include iOS ordering/equal-weight data for Apple, phone, and WeChat when third-party login is enabled.
- [x] Update API contract and generated types (AC: 5)
  - [x] Update `docs/api/openapi.yaml` for auth/session/config responses if missing.
  - [x] Run `pnpm -F nomad-types run generate` after OpenAPI edits.
- [x] Add focused verification (AC: 7)
  - [x] Add or update route-level tests/probes for OTP start, OTP verify, `/me`, logout, session delete, invalid payloads, and unauthenticated access.
  - [x] Run `pnpm -F nomad-server exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` and `pnpm -r build`.

### Review Findings

- [x] [Review][Patch] OTP verify must validate an issued, unexpired OTP and reject invalid or missing challenges [apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:143]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Session cookies must use non-deterministic session ids with stable session metadata and revocation [apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:108]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Captcha-required OTP start must not treat any non-empty `captcha_token` as valid [apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:97]
- [x] [Review][Patch] OpenAPI `OtpVerifyRequest` must require `otp` or `code` and match server constraints [docs/api/openapi.yaml:976]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Auth OpenAPI responses must match implementation headers and error components [docs/api/openapi.yaml:717]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Auth probe must cover invalid verify bodies and negative session/captcha paths [apps/server/scripts/auth-contract-probe.ts:49]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Third-party login metadata must preserve Apple/phone/WeChat iOS equal-weight guidance when third-party login is enabled [apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:74]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Fastify 5 runtime requirement must be explicit through Node engine metadata [apps/server/package.json:21]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Invalid captcha mode must not silently disable captcha protection [apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:40]
- [x] [Review][Patch] OTP retry timing, disabled phone login, conflicting aliases, duplicate device headers, and TTL bounds need explicit guards [apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:12]

## Dev Notes

- Current backend already registers auth, BYOK, account, trace ID, error envelope, idempotency, queues, and SSE helpers in `apps/server/src/index.ts`.
- Current auth implementation is intentionally lightweight: `/auth/otp/start` always returns `captcha_required=false`; `/auth/otp/verify` derives a placeholder `u_...` id from the phone and sets `sid`; `authGuard` trusts cookie `sid` or `x-user-id`.
- This story should improve the current contract without pretending production SMS, OAuth, Tencent Captcha, or persistent sessions are already complete. If an adapter is stubbed, make the stub explicit and testable.
- Do not add frontend/mobile app scaffolding in this story. Story 1.2 owns the login first-screen UI.
- Do not introduce Windows-side project files or Windows-native Node/pnpm usage.

### Project Structure Notes

- Backend route files to inspect first: `apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts`, `apps/server/src/plugins/auth.ts`, `apps/server/src/plugins/error-envelope.ts`, and `apps/server/src/index.ts`.
- API SSOT is `docs/api/openapi.yaml`; generated types are `packages/types/src/api-types.ts`.
- If persistent sessions are introduced, only add the minimal Prisma changes this story needs and align with `packages/prisma/schema.prisma`.

### Debug Log References

- `pnpm ci:auth`: passed auth contract probe.
- `pnpm -F nomad-server exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit`: passed server type check.
- `pnpm -r build`: passed monorepo build.
- `PORT=3999 timeout 5s pnpm -F nomad-server run start`: server started and held until timeout; local Redis was not running and logged `ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:6379`.
- BMAD code-review gate: Blind Hunter, Edge Case Hunter, and Acceptance Auditor produced 10 patch findings.
- `pnpm ci:auth`: passed after review fixes for OTP challenge validation, opaque sessions, captcha stub validation, and negative paths.
- `pnpm -F nomad-types run generate`: regenerated auth/session types after OpenAPI review fixes.
- `pnpm -F nomad-server exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit`: passed after review fixes.
- `pnpm -r build`: passed after review fixes.
- `PORT=3999 timeout 5s pnpm -F nomad-server run start`: server started and held until timeout after review fixes; local Redis remained unavailable and logged `ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:6379`.

### Completion Notes List

- Hardened existing auth routes in place with Zod validation, captcha policy, httpOnly cookie session creation, current user/session responses, logout, and session delete behavior.
- Added `/auth/config` compliance metadata for privacy/user-agreement URLs, enabled login methods, iOS equal-weight ordering, and Tencent captcha policy mode.
- Updated OpenAPI auth/session contracts and regenerated TypeScript API types from the OpenAPI source of truth.
- Added a focused auth contract probe under the server package and fixed the server Fastify runtime baseline/start path so auth route registration is executable in WSL.
- Resolved BMAD code-review findings by adding issued OTP challenge validation, opaque in-memory session ids, session revocation, stricter captcha stub validation, negative auth probe coverage, OpenAPI request/response alignment, and Node engine metadata for Fastify 5.
